Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Text Ruling

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-12-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar in light of November 5, 2020 ruling and order re petition for coordination (JCCP No. 5125), which stays this action pending further order of the coordination trial judge. In the event the add-on petition is denied, the parties may place the demurrer back on calendar by stipulating to a new hearing date and contacting the calendar clerk.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Off Calendar Oct-23-2020 Continued To Dec-03-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
